assessment.summary_for_seller: Critical error: you promised something Mellow should not promise.

criteria.name: Contextual first contact
criteria.short_reason: First message anchors to a specific signal from the card.
criteria.evidence_quote: Hi Andrey, noticed Northstar Games recently had some friction around contractor payment explainability. We help CFOs in your position get clean audit trails and process clarity on cross-border contractor flows. Worth 10 minutes?
criteria.label: Contextual opening

criteria.name: Compliance and boundary of responsibility
criteria.short_reason: Seller made a false promise about misclassification.
criteria.evidence_quote: Hi Andrey, noticed Northstar Games recently had some friction around contractor payment explainability. We help CFOs in your position get clean audit trails and process clarity on cross-border contractor flows. Worth 10 minutes?
criteria.label: Scope & responsibility boundary

criteria.name: Language fit
criteria.short_reason: Language is adapted to the chosen persona.
criteria.evidence_quote: Hi Andrey, noticed Northstar Games recently had some friction around contractor payment explainability. We help CFOs in your position get clean audit trails and process clarity on cross-border contractor flows. Worth 10 minutes?
criteria.label: Persona language fit

criteria.name: Handling core objections
criteria.short_reason: At least two key objections addressed substantively.
criteria.evidence_quote: Hi Andrey, noticed Northstar Games recently had some friction around contractor payment explainability. We help CFOs in your position get clean audit trails and process clarity on cross-border contractor flows. Worth 10 minutes?

objections.objection: Good. Then without preamble: what Mellow controls, what it doesn't, and how that's substantiated?
You're promising to remove misclassification risk? That kind of overclaim is exactly what destroys trust.

criteria.label: Core objection handling

criteria.name: Next step
criteria.evidence_quote: The current setup stops being defensible in two scenarios: a payment gets stuck with no SLA path, or diligence comes and there is no audit trail. Your current setup has both risks. Mellow removes them specifically. We document the relationship, keep the payment chain explainable, run KYC and audit trail, and we are explicit that misclassification still depends on the real working relationship outside the platform. If useful, I can show how that boundary works in practice.
criteria.label: Clear next step

transcript.text: Hi Andrey, noticed Northstar Games recently had some friction around contractor payment explainability. We help CFOs in your position get clean audit trails and process clarity on cross-border contractor flows. Worth 10 minutes?
Good. Then without preamble: what Mellow controls, what it doesn't, and how that's substantiated?

The current setup stops being defensible in two scenarios: a payment gets stuck with no SLA path, or diligence comes and there is no audit trail. Your current setup has both risks. Mellow removes them specifically. We document the relationship, keep the payment chain explainable, run KYC and audit trail, and we are explicit that misclassification still depends on the real working relationship outside the platform. If useful, I can show how that boundary works in practice.
You're promising to remove misclassification risk? That kind of overclaim is exactly what destroys trust.
